headline: Travelers (TRV) Stock May Be 47% Undervalued Despite Its AI Launch
summary: Travelers Companies stock has delivered a strong 146.0% return over the last five years, yet its current checks send a mixed valuation message, with an Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate suggesting the shares may still trade at a sizeable discount to what the fundamentals imply. Over five years, Travelers Companies has returned 146.0%, which puts recent gains into context as investors weigh how much of the story is already reflected in the price.
